# JPEG 2000 Conformance Fixture Manifest
#
# This manifest lists external JPEG 2000 conformance fixtures expected to be
# downloaded by a future build step. Each entry is one fixture per line in the
# form:
#
#   <relative_path> SHA256=<hex-digest>
#
# The SHA256 value is a placeholder (<tbd>) until the upstream ISO/ITU
# conformance suite fetch step is wired into build.zig. Until then these files
# are NOT present in the repo and tests that consume them must be gated.
#
# TODO: add a build step that fetches and verifies these fixtures.

p0_01.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p0_02.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p0_03.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p0_04.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p0_05.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p0_06.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p0_07.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p0_08.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p0_09.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p0_10.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p0_11.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p0_12.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p1_01.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p1_02.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p1_03.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p1_04.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p1_05.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p1_06.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
p1_07.j2k SHA256=<tbd>
